plugins.name: sdlc-skills
plugins.description: Full SDLC toolkit — role-based agents, workflow skills, and session/subagent hooks (per-role memory + lean .agents/*.md project-context injection).

plugins.name: accessibility-audit
plugins.description: Accessibility & WCAG 2.1 AA/AAA audit — axe-core + visual review (contrast, ARIA, keyboard, focus)

plugins.name: atlassian-content
plugins.description: Create well-formatted Jira issues/comments (ADF, API v3) and Confluence pages (storage format) with accountId-backed mentions and mandatory post-creation re-fetch + repair

plugins.name: browser-verify
plugins.description: Browser verification via CDP — visual checks, screenshots, accessibility

plugins.name: bugfix-workflow
plugins.description: End-to-end bugfix workflow — reproduce, test, fix, verify, document

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Structured code review — security, quality, conventions

plugins.name: completing-a-task
plugins.description: Five-step task completion protocol: verify locally → commit on feature branch → push & open PR → comment on tracker issue → notify the orchestrator. Used by devs at handoff

plugins.name: content-seo-audit
plugins.description: Content & SEO audit — copy quality, meta tags, structured data, headings, links

plugins.name: deep-research
plugins.description: Deep research workflow — trends, topic analysis, fact-checking

plugins.name: gathering-context
plugins.description: Cross-channel context gathering — email, Teams, local KB

plugins.name: git-workflow
plugins.description: Git branching, PR creation, and merge workflow

plugins.name: implement-feature
plugins.description: End-to-end feature implementation workflow — plan, test, build, ship

plugins.name: issue-tracking
plugins.description: GitHub issue lifecycle — labelling, commenting, closing

plugins.name: memory
plugins.description: Persistent file-based memory across conversations

plugins.name: microsoft-365
plugins.description: Microsoft Graph (email/calendar/Teams) integration

plugins.name: obsidian-vault
plugins.description: Read/write the user's Obsidian second brain

plugins.name: performance-audit
plugins.description: Performance audit — Core Web Vitals, network waterfall, console errors, JS issues

plugins.name: plan-feature
plugins.description: Structured feature planning — requirements, feasibility, acceptance criteria

plugins.name: playwright-testing
plugins.description: End-to-end browser testing with Playwright

plugins.name: privacy-audit
plugins.description: Privacy & GDPR audit — cookies, trackers, storage, consent banners

plugins.name: quality-audit-workflow
plugins.description: Multi-dimension quality-audit orchestration — modes, p0-p3 finding schema, specialist routing, persona review, reporting

plugins.name: quality-onboarding
plugins.description: Standalone quality-architect self-onboarding (no scout) — interview, ingest codebase/docs/specs, synthesize a product quality profile into .agents/quality.md

plugins.name: reproducing-issues
plugins.description: Reproduce a vague bug report into precise repeatable steps + evidence, ending in a CONFIRMED/CANNOT-REPRODUCE verdict (reproduction only)

plugins.name: requirement-traceability
plugins.description: Requirement↔case↔result triangulation + story triage — coverage matrix, gaps-and-questions report, uncovered/orphan/stale/weak-evidence findings

plugins.name: responsive-audit
plugins.description: Responsive / mobile-web audit — touch targets, viewport, overflow, breakpoints (CDP emulation)

plugins.name: root-cause-analysis
plugins.description: Trace a confirmed bug to its exact cause — execution path, classification, confidence, impact analysis (investigation only)

plugins.name: security-audit
plugins.description: Web security audit — XSS, CSRF, headers (CSP/HSTS), mixed content, exposed secrets, OWASP Top 10

plugins.name: seeding-a-project
plugins.description: Generate AGENTS.md, .agents/ content docs, and per-role memory briefings for a new project (used by scout)

plugins.name: session-retrospective
plugins.description: Distill past Claude Code sessions (main + sub-agent) into evidenced, ack-gated memory and workflow improvements (used by scout)

plugins.name: test-automation-workflow
plugins.description: End-to-end test automation workflow — explore, specify (AFS), implement, review. Pluggable TMS adapters (Zephyr Scale, TestRail, Xray, Azure Test Plans, markdown) over HTTP or MCP

plugins.name: test-case-analysis
plugins.description: Execute a TMS test case against the live app, capture stable selectors, flag defects, and emit an Automation-Friendly Spec (AFS). Used by qa-engineer

plugins.name: test-generation
plugins.description: Coverage-gap proposal — candidate test scenarios from a live page / audit findings (hands off to AFS)

plugins.name: tosca-automation
plugins.description: Tricentis TOSCA Cloud full lifecycle — create/update/run TestCases, Modules (Html + SapEngine), Reusable Blocks, Playlists, Inventory folders, TSU import/export. Bundled `tosca_cli.py` (httpx + typer + rich)

plugins.name: ux-audit
plugins.description: UI/UX & page-type audit — forms, error messaging, 20+ page-type patterns

plugins.name: verifying-outcomes
plugins.description: Goal-backward verification — check outcomes, not task completion

plugins.name: vividus
plugins.description: Bootstrap, configure, and author tests for the Vividus BDD framework (JBehave-based, 47+ plugins covering web/Selenium+Playwright, REST, mobile/Appium, DB, messaging, AWS/Azure, visual, accessibility). Config-first `.story` files, suite/profile/environment triple, BOM-pinned versions, MCP-server grounding. Templates in `assets/` for scaffolding

plugins.name: xlsx-reader
plugins.description: Read .xlsx spreadsheets (test cases, checklists) into Markdown for agent ingestion.

plugins.name: xray-testing
plugins.description: CRUD + results import on Xray entities (Test / Precondition / Test Set / Test Plan / Test Execution / Test Run) across Xray Cloud (GraphQL) and Server/DC (REST). JUnit / Cucumber / Xray JSON import formats
